dimensions.name: correctness
dimensions.evidence: `adapters/pi/furrow.ts:916-928` wires the D4 `tool_call` handler through `runDefinitionValidationHandler`, and `adapters/pi/validate-actions.ts:45-68` enforces silent allow on `valid` and `{ block: true, reason }` + `notify(..., 'error')` with `remediation_hint`; fresh `bun test` passed `37/37`, including fixture-row D4 tests at `adapters/pi/furrow.test.ts:379-444`.

dimensions.name: test-coverage
dimensions.evidence: All new D4 branching paths are exercised: gate/no-op, valid allow, invalid block+notify, exact arg shape, and fixture-row valid/invalid/non-definition cases in `adapters/pi/furrow.test.ts:75-125`, `207-249`, and `379-444`.

dimensions.name: spec-compliance
dimensions.evidence: The handler intercepts only `edit`/`write` on `*/definition.yaml` via `shouldInterceptForDefinitionValidation` (`adapters/pi/validate-actions.ts:83-94`), invokes `['validate','definition','--path',filePath,'--json']` (`adapters/pi/validate-actions.ts:66-68`), and the pre-existing state guard still runs first and unchanged at `adapters/pi/furrow.ts:895-910` before the D4 handler at `:916-928`; required scaffolding exists in `adapters/pi/package.json`, `adapters/pi/tsconfig.json`, and `adapters/pi/furrow.test.ts`.

dimensions.name: unplanned-changes
dimensions.evidence: The D4 deliverable’s declared `file_ownership` in `.furrow/rows/pre-write-validation-go-first/definition.yaml:64-82` covers the changed adapter files (`furrow.ts`, `furrow.test.ts`, `validate-actions.ts`, `package.json`, `tsconfig.json`, `README.md`), and the D4-scoped adapter changes are confined to those owned paths.

dimensions.name: code-quality
dimensions.evidence: The implementation follows the existing adapter pattern (`runFurrowJson` wrapper + pure helper extraction), uses explicit types in `adapters/pi/validate-actions.ts`, and the adapter suite passes cleanly with `bun test` (`37 pass, 0 fail`); no separate lint/typecheck runner is configured in `adapters/pi/`.
